adaptiveTheme.title: Adaptive Theme Color
adaptiveTheme.description: Dynamically match the primary color to the current album art.

customColor.title: Custom Color
customColor.description: Customize the primary color of the active theme.

visualizerStyle.title: Visualizer Style
visualizerStyle.description: Choose the appearance of the audio visualizer.

spatialAudio.title: 8D Spatial Audio
spatialAudio.description: Creates a 3D immersive experience by moving the sound around your head.

eq.title: Equalizer
eq.description: Adjust the 10-band audio equalizer to your liking.

info.title: Information
info.description: About the application and useful keyboard shortcuts.
info.shortcutsNote: Global shortcuts work even when the app is in the background.
